fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Denotes whether the price adjustment on the line refers to a service quote or a service order.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the service order or service quote. To enter a new document number, you can use one of the following methods:

If you have set up a default service order number series, press Enter. The program will automatically fill in this field with the next number in the series.


If you have not set up a default service order number series, you can enter a number manually.


The document number must be unique, you cannot use the same number twice in one table. You can set up as many numbers as you want.

fields.name: Service Line No.
fields.tooltip: Contains the number of the service order or service quote to which the service line is linked. When you insert a service item line, the program copies the number from the Document Type field on the service order header.

fields.name: Service Item Line No.
fields.tooltip: Displays the number of the service item line. The program numbers the lines sequentially, and uses the numbers to keep track of the different service item lines.

fields.name: Service Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service item that is registered in the Service Item table.

fields.name: Serv. Price Adjmt. Gr. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the service price adjustment group that applies to the posted service line.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of this line, which can be item, resource, cost, or general ledger Account.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service item, resource, or service cost, of which the price is going to be adjusted.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the service line that will be adjusted.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total net amount on the service line.

fields.name: New Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount to invoice.

fields.name: Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price of one unit of the item or resource. You can enter a price manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field on the related card.

fields.name: New Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit price of the item, resource, or cost specified on the service line.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip:
Contains the unit cost of the item or the resource on the line.
The value of this field is copied from the Unit Cost field in the Service Line table and is therefore non-editable.

fields.name: Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount percentage you want to provide on the amount on the corresponding service line.

fields.name: Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount you want to provide on the amount on this service line.

fields.name: Amount incl. VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total amount that the service line is going to be adjusted, including VAT.

fields.name: New Amount incl. VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies a new amount, including VAT.

fields.name: Weight
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Adjustment Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the adjustment type for this line.

fields.name: Service Price Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the service price adjustment group associated with the service item on this line.

fields.name: Manually Adjusted
fields.tooltip:
Indicates whether the adjustment was performed manually. A check mark in this field indicates that the adjustment was performed manually; a blank field indicates that the adjustment was performed automatically.
This field is not editable.

fields.name: Vat %
fields.tooltip:
Contains the VAT percentage of the item, resource, or cost on the service line.
The value of this field is copied from the Service Line table, and is therefore not editable.

fields.name: New Amount Excl. VAT
fields.tooltip:
Contains a new net amount on the service line, excluding VAT.
If you enter a value in this field, it will overrule the value that was copied from the Service Line table.
